rationale: The candidate provided a high-quality translation that maintains all MDX structures and heading counts. It correctly handled the asset paths (adding ../) and preserved the technical code blocks. The Hebrew prose is natural and fits the direct, slightly humorous tone of the original. It also correctly translated the quiz options and explanations while keeping the technical terms like HTML tags intact.
